alerts.title: Flight price dropped for your planned Switzerland trip
alerts.summary: A public fare watch found a lower Singapore to Zurich price than the last snapshot. This is the kind of alert you would want before booking.
alerts.trigger: Observed public fares are about CHF 110 lower than the last saved snapshot across direct and aggregator checks.
alerts.suggestedAction: Open the latest fare comparison and book while the lower fare is still visible.
alerts.holdWindow: Best booked within the next 6 hours

alerts.title: Weather risk detected for a mountain stop
alerts.summary: A cached sentry scenario shows how the app would warn about poor mountain visibility and suggest a reorder.
alerts.trigger: Heavy cloud and wind risk on the planned high-altitude stop day.
alerts.suggestedAction: Move the valley and cafe stop earlier, then shift the mountain viewpoint to the clearest weather window.
